attributes.action: Zebra crossing outside Skevington Lane Cotmanhay junior School
attributes.additional_details: I am trying to get it  to get a zebra crossing outside Skevington Lane Cotmanhay Junior school and Cotmanhay infant School and nursery I would like to keep our children safe as they go to school and come home from school. The school also kids with additional needs at School. there’s already nearly been an accident and I don’t want one to happen and it’s too late to do something about it. Keep our children safe. That’s all am asking for we don’t want that horrible phone call phone that be hurt.
attributes.background: I would love to get a zebra cross and put down near Skevington Lane just outside Cotmanhay junior School and cotmanhay and infant and nurse School
